sentences.target: Je transforme cette vieille veste en sac.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tʁɑ̃sfɔʁm sɛt vjɛj vɛst ɑ̃ sak/

translations.fr: Je transforme cette vieille veste en sac.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tʁɑ̃sfɔʁm sɛt vjɛj vɛst ɑ̃ sak/
translations.en: I’m turning this old jacket into a bag.
translations.es: Estoy convirtiendo esta chaqueta vieja en un bolso.
translations.de: Ich verwandle diese alte Jacke in eine Tasche.
translations.it: Sto trasformando questa vecchia giacca in una borsa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把这件旧夹克改造成一个包。
translations.yue: 我將呢件舊褸改造成一個袋。
translations.ru: Я превращаю эту старую куртку в сумку.
translations.pt: Estou transformando esta jaqueta velha em uma bolsa.
translations.he: אני הופך את הז'קט הישן הזה לתיק.
translations.tr: Bu eski ceketi bir çantaya dönüştürüyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang biến chiếc áo khoác cũ này thành một chiếc túi.
translations.ar: أحوّل هذه السترة القديمة إلى حقيبة.
translations.nl: Ik maak van deze oude jas een tas.
translations.uk: Я перетворюю цю стару куртку на сумку.
translations.hu: Ezt a régi kabátot táskává alakítom.
translations.hi: मैं इस पुरानी जैकेट को बैग में बदल रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Przerabiam tę starą kurtkę na torbę.
translations.el: Μετατρέπω αυτό το παλιό μπουφάν σε τσάντα.
translations.nb: Jeg gjør denne gamle jakken om til en veske.
translations.id: Saya mengubah jaket tua ini menjadi tas.
translations.sv: Jag gör om den här gamla jackan till en väska.
translations.ro: Transform această geacă veche într-o geantă.
translations.cs: Přetvářím tuto starou bundu na tašku.
translations.da: Jeg laver denne gamle jakke om til en taske.
translations.ja: この古いジャケットをバッグに作り替えています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking a direct object ('cette vieille veste') and a result complement introduced by 'en'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'veste' to specify a particular item.
Qualifying adjective, feminine singular; pre-nominal; agrees with 'veste' in gender and number.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'transforme'.
Preposition indicating transformation into a resulting state; introduces the complement 'sac'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'en', denoting the result.

sentences.target: On transforme le salon en bureau.

translations.fr: On transforme le salon en bureau.
translations.en: We’re turning the living room into an office.
translations.es: Estamos convirtiendo la sala de estar en una oficina.
translations.de: Wir machen aus dem Wohnzimmer ein Büro.
translations.it: Stiamo trasformando il soggiorno in un ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把客厅改成办公室。
translations.yue: 我哋將客廳改造成辦公室。
translations.pt: Estamos transformando a sala de estar em um escritório.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang biến phòng khách thành văn phòng.
translations.nl: We maken van de woonkamer een kantoor.
translations.hi: हम बैठक कक्ष को दफ़्तर में बदल रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi gjør om stuen til et kontor.
translations.id: Kami mengubah ruang tamu menjadi kantor.
translations.sv: Vi gör om vardagsrummet till ett kontor.
translations.da: Vi laver stuen om til et kontor.
translations.ja: リビングをオフィスに変えています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; grammatically 3rd person singular, often meaning 'we/one'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); transitive, with direct object 'le salon' and result complement 'en bureau'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'transforme'.
Preposition marking the resulting state of the transformation; introduces 'bureau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'en', indicating the result.

sentences.target: Tu veux transformer ta chambre en coin bureau.
sentences.reading: /ty vø tʁɑ̃sfɔʁme ta ʃɑ̃bʁ ɑ̃ kwɛ̃ byʁo/

translations.fr: Tu veux transformer ta chambre en coin bureau.
translations.ipa: /ty vø tʁɑ̃sfɔʁme ta ʃɑ̃bʁ ɑ̃ kwɛ̃ byʁo/
translations.en: You want to turn your bedroom into a desk area.
translations.es: Quieres convertir tu dormitorio en un rincón de trabajo.
translations.de: Du willst dein Schlafzimmer in eine Arbeitsecke verwandeln.
translations.it: Vuoi trasformare la tua camera da letto in un angolo studio.
translations.ko: 너는 네 침실을 작업 코너로 바꾸고 싶어해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你想把卧室改成一个办公角落。
translations.yue: 你想將你間睡房改造成一個工作角落。
translations.ru: Ты хочешь превратить свою спальню в рабочий уголок.
translations.pt: Você quer transformar seu quarto em um cantinho de trabalho.
translations.he: אתה רוצה להפוך את חדר השינה שלך לפינת עבודה.
translations.tr: Yatak odanı bir çalışma köşesine dönüştürmek istiyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn biến phòng ngủ của mình thành một góc làm việc.
translations.ar: تريد تحويل غرفة نومك إلى زاوية عمل.
translations.nl: Je wilt je slaapkamer omtoveren tot een werkhoek.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш перетворити свою спальню на робочий куточок.
translations.hi: तुम अपना शयनकक्ष एक काम के कोने में बदलना चाहते हो.
translations.pl: Chcesz zamienić swoją sypialnię w kącik do pracy.
translations.el: Θέλεις να μετατρέψεις την κρεβατοκάμαρά σου σε γωνιά εργασίας.
translations.nb: Du vil gjøre soverommet ditt om til en arbeidskrok.
translations.id: Kamu ingin mengubah kamar tidurmu menjadi sudut kerja.
translations.sv: Du vill göra om ditt sovrum till en arbetsvrå.
translations.ro: Vrei să transformi dormitorul tău într-un colț de lucru.
translations.cs: Chceš proměnit svou ložnici v pracovní koutek.
translations.da: Du vil lave dit soveværelse om til et arbejdshjørne.
translations.ja: あなたは寝室を作業用のコーナーにしたいと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal); subject of 'veux'.
Main (modal) verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'transformer' as its complement.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'veux'; transitive, taking 'ta chambre' as direct object and 'en coin bureau' as the result complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'chambre' and agrees in gender/number.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'transformer'.
Preposition introducing the resulting state phrase 'coin bureau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP functioning as the object of 'en'.
Common noun, masculine singular; used as a noun modifier specifying the type of 'coin' (compound noun phrase 'coin bureau').

sentences.target: Elles transforment le jardin en potager.

translations.fr: Elles transforment le jardin en potager.
translations.en: They’re turning the garden into a vegetable patch.
translations.es: Están convirtiendo el jardín en un huerto.
translations.de: Sie verwandeln den Garten in einen Gemüsegarten.
translations.it: Stanno trasformando il giardino in un orto.
translations.yue: 佢哋將個花園改造成菜園。
translations.pt: Elas estão transformando o jardim em uma horta.
translations.he: הן הופכות את הגינה לגינת ירק.
translations.vi: Họ đang biến khu vườn thành vườn rau.
translations.ar: هنّ يحوّلن الحديقة إلى حديقة خضروات.
translations.nl: Ze maken van de tuin een moestuin.
translations.hi: वे बगीचे को सब्जियों की क्यारी में बदल रही हैं.
translations.nb: De gjør hagen om til en grønnsakshage.
translations.id: Mereka mengubah kebun menjadi kebun sayur.
translations.sv: De gör om trädgården till en köksträdgård.
translations.ro: Ele transformă grădina într-o grădină de legume.
translations.da: De laver haven om til en køkkenhave.
translations.ja: 彼女たちは庭を菜園に変えています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural, feminine; subject of 'transforment'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, with 'le jardin' as direct object and 'en potager' as result complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'jardin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'transforment'.
Preposition indicating the resulting state of the transformation; introduces 'potager'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'en', denoting the result.
